title: Ornith (35B,9B) + Hermes,Zed: THE FULLY PRIVATE LOCAL AGENT is ACTUALLY HERE!
summary: Ornith is a new family of open agentic coding models from DeepReinforce, ranging from 9B to 397B parameters, built on Gemma and Qwen. The models are designed for coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, with MIT licensing and GGUF versions available for local deployment.
writeup: The video covers Ornith, a new family of open agentic coding models from DeepReinforce that ranges from 9B to 397B parameters and is built on Gemma and Qwen. The models target coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, with the demonstration pairing them with Hermes and the Zed editor for a fully private local setup. Key takeaways: the models carry MIT licensing, ship in GGUF versions for local deployment, and emphasize reasoning, planning, and test-time compute for agentic tasks.
